name: claude-watchdog
description: Auto-runs a critical session post-mortem when Claude Code stops. Ships the analyze-session command, session-analyzer agent, and a Stop hook that triggers the review in-session (no external API calls).

disabled.title: Disable watchdog
disabled.description: Set to true to disable automatic session analysis

min_tool_uses.title: Minimum tool calls
min_tool_uses.description: Skip analysis if the session delta has fewer tool calls than this. Default is 8

cooldown_seconds.title: Cooldown (seconds)
cooldown_seconds.description: Minimum seconds between analyses for the same session. Set to 0 to disable. Default is 600 (10 minutes)

verbose.title: Enable verbose mode
verbose.description: Prepend a diagnostics header (raw/condensed size, tool use count, user messages) to every condensed transcript and add truncation notices when applicable

local_session_storage.title: Store transcripts in project directory
local_session_storage.description: Store condensed session transcripts under .claude/tmp/claude-watchdog/ in the project directory instead of the global plugin data path. Eliminates Read permission prompts in auto mode. Requires .claude/ in .gitignore. Default is true

max_transcript_bytes.title: Max transcript size (bytes)
max_transcript_bytes.description: Maximum size of the condensed transcript sent to the analyzer, in bytes. Larger values give the analyzer more context but increase processing time. Default is 51200 (50 KB)

interactive_recommendations.title: Interactive recommendations
interactive_recommendations.description: After session analysis, present actionable recommendations as an interactive multi-select prompt so you can choose which items to address. Selected items are saved to .claude/watchdog-todo.md

skip_with_background_tasks.title: Skip while background tasks run
skip_with_background_tasks.description: Skip analysis when background tasks (subagents, shell jobs, workflows) are still in flight, so the watchdog only reviews a session that's truly done, not one that's merely paused. Requires Claude Code >= 2.1.145; a no-op on older versions. Default is true

hold_input_during_analysis.title: Hold input while analysis runs
hold_input_during_analysis.description: Block newly submitted prompts while a session analysis is still in flight, so they don't interleave with the pending analysis. A held prompt is recoverable with up-arrow; resubmitting overrides the hold. The hold auto-expires after 240 seconds. Default is false
